goal_text: Task 11328: You want to find an expensive restaurant and it should serve mediterranean food. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the address, phone number, and area of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
